title: Smoke Scare In Jabalpur Medical College NICU: 30 Infants Evacuated, Families Allege Negligence
description: A short circuit in a ceiling fan filled paediatric ward at Netaji Subhash Chandra Bose Medical College with smoke, triggering panic and clashes. A newborn’s death shortly before the incident fuels outrage among family members of the infants as probe begins.
